title: Research Evaluation and Priority Assessment at the International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-arid Tropics(ICRISAT): Continuing cycles of Learning to Improve Impacts
abstract: This chapter documents the research priority assessment methods used a the ICRISAT.  Research evaluation and priority assessment have evolved to provide continuous cycles of learning to improve impacts.  Prior to 1992, research priorities were established based on consultative meetings with ICRISAT and National Agricultural Research Systems (NARS) scientist to identify key productivity constraints and propose research themes and approaches to address them....
